workflows.name: bootstrap_mailbox_agent
workflows.goal: Mint the narrowest viable mailbox-scoped bearer token, then return the agent to the normal mailbox workflow surface.
stopConditions: mailbox identity or tenant ownership is unclear
the requested token scope exceeds the mailbox workflow need
the intended agent binding is ambiguous

workflows.name: review_tenant_outbound_access
workflows.goal: Gather billing and policy context before deciding whether a tenant should be approved for external send, reset back to review, or suspended.
stopConditions: the tenant identity or mailbox inventory is incomplete
payment state is still ambiguous or disputed
the review outcome would broaden outbound access without operator approval

workflows.name: forensic_delivery_inspection
workflows.goal: Correlate message, draft, outbound-job, delivery-event, and suppression state before taking remediation actions on a delivery incident.
stopConditions: the lookup target does not uniquely identify the delivery case
delivery evidence is incomplete and requires provider-side logs
adding a suppression would materially change customer delivery behavior without human review
